summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Universal Lottery Terminal System for LOTTOLAB. All 9 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, New Ticket, Tickets, Results, Reports) are loading and functioning correctly. Agent login works without IMEI header for browser devices. Real-time sync is working with 5-second interval.

issues: Live results section shows data from sync, historical results section says 'Aucun résultat pour cette date' - this is expected behavior as it filters by company's enabled lotteries

critical_code_review_comments: All agent pages have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
AgentLayout correctly implements real-time sync every 5 seconds
Token and user data are properly stored in localStorage after agent login
All navigation items are working correctly
The schedules array is empty in device/config response - this may need attention if schedules are expected for the enabled lotteries
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing agent001@lotopam.com account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Agent Terminal System tested and working. Agent login at /agent/login works without IMEI header. Dashboard shows stats and quick actions. New Ticket page has lottery/tirage selection with bet types and amount input. All routes properly protected by ProtectedRoute with AGENT_POS role. Real-time sync polls /api/device/sync every 5 seconds.

backend_apis.POST /api/auth/agent/login: PASS - Works without IMEI header, returns token, agent_id, agent_name, company_id, device_session_id, is_hardware_pos=false
backend_apis.GET /api/device/config: PASS - Returns company, agent, configuration, lotteries, schedules, prime_configs
backend_apis.GET /api/device/sync: PASS - Returns results, daily_stats, balance, server_time
backend_apis.GET /api/agent/tickets: PASS - Returns list of agent's tickets
backend_apis.GET /api/agent/reports: PASS - Returns period, details, totals with net_revenue

frontend_pages./agent/login: PASS - Login form with email/password, proper validation, redirects to dashboard
frontend_pages./agent/dashboard: PASS - Shows welcome message, quick actions (Nouvelle Vente, Mes Tickets, Résultats), stats cards, recent tickets and results
frontend_pages./agent/new-ticket: PASS - Lottery/tirage selection, bet type dropdown, numbers input, amount field, quick amount buttons, validate sale button
frontend_pages./agent/tickets: PASS - Search, status filter, ticket list (currently empty)
frontend_pages./agent/results: PASS - Live results from sync, date picker for historical results
frontend_pages./agent/reports: PASS - Date range selector, summary cards (Tickets, Ventes, Gains, Annulés, Net), details by lottery table

integration.user_data_storage: PASS - User object with user_id, name, role, company_id, email stored
integration.protected_routes: PASS - All /agent/* routes protected by AGENT_POS role
